title: bufonia iranica
intro: Bufonia iranica, also known as Iranian Bufonia, is a perennial plant that belongs to the saxifragaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Bufonia iranica include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications to treat skin conditions.
